title: India's Godrej Aerospace eyes share of GE 414 engine manufacturing

title: The 7 Best Growth Stocks to Buy in July

title: Spinoffs Roundup: These Companies Could Unlock Value in 2023
text: Spinoffs are known for being a mixed bag from an investor's viewpoint. Some of them can unlock the true value of businesses by allowing the spinoff and the parent company to focus on their niches rather than being hampered by underinvestment and undervaluation as part of a bulkier corporation.

title: Is It Worth Investing in GE (GE) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
text: When deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock, investors often rely on analyst recommendations. Media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts often influence a stock's price, but are they really important?
